metadata.description: Minable rock signatures — SC 4.7 per-mineral signature system
notes: SC 4.7 introduces per-mineral signatures. Each mineral has a unique signature value regardless of whether it is in an asteroid or a surface rock.
The old I/C/S/P/M/Q/E asteroid type system is REMOVED in SC 4.7.
Signature 4000 collision: Large ground deposits (ROC/GV) and any remaining generic surface entity bases share 4000. All ship-mined minerals now have unique signatures above 3000.
Vlk Pearls and Flowstone have signature 0 and are undetectable by scanner.
FPS small ground deposits = 3000. ROC/GV large ground deposits = 4000.

SC 4.7 salvage update: new debris signatures — 1700 (small/Avenger-class), 1850 (medium/Ares Inferno), 2400 (large/C2 Hercules), 3000 (capital/890 Jump). Signature 3000 now collides: FPS ground deposit small AND capital wreck debris.

ship_mining.composition: Signature identifies the dominant mineral (40–80%). Secondary minerals also present (5–20%). PTU source: mining_data-4.7.0-ptu.11450623.json
ship_mining.note: SC 4.7 system: signature uniquely identifies the dominant mineral and its value tier. Rock is not pure — secondary minerals exist.

small.primary_method: FPS/Hand mining (can be mined by vehicles with skill)

large.primary_method: ROC/Vehicle mining (can be mined by multiple FPS miners)

cluster_rules: Each cluster spawns only ONE mineral type at 100% purity
A mineral spawns as either small OR large deposits in a cluster, never both

ship_mining._description: SC 4.7+ per-mineral signature system. Signature identifies the dominant mineral (40-80% composition). Rocks also contain secondary minerals (5-20%). Applies to both asteroids and surface deposits (ship-mined). Tiers indicate value: Legendary > Epic > Rare > Uncommon > Common.

ground_deposits._description: Ground deposits — ROC or FPS mining. 100% single mineral per cluster. Signature does NOT identify the mineral (all use same base sig per size).

small._method: FPS/Hand mining (can be mined by vehicles with skill)

large._method: ROC/Vehicle mining (can be mined by multiple FPS miners)

signature_lookup.3000: FPS Ground Deposit (Small) | Capital Wreck Debris (890 Jump) [COLLISION]

salvage._description: Salvage signatures for SC 4.7. Panels = active hull scraping work. Debris = detached wreck hull pieces, sized by ship class. Debris types added in SC 4.7 salvage gameplay update.

panels._description: Active FPS hull scraping panels + SalvageScrap pieces + SalvageableRepairable ship parts. Signature = 2000 x panel count.

small._description: Avenger-class hull debris. Also: scrap commodity cargo containers (TBO Carryables).

capital._description: 890 Jump-class hull debris. COLLISION: 3000 also matches FPS small ground deposits. Context-dependent.
